clusters.label: regression
clusters.fix: verifyToken() was missing the IFC-169 mock-key guard. When config.usingMockKeys is true, fell through to supabaseAdmin.auth.getUser() which hit real/missing Supabase endpoint and returned 'fetch failed'. Added early return at top of verifyToken: returns Error('Mock keys cannot verify real tokens') when config.usingMockKeys. This is a production fix — test codified intended IFC-169 behavior that production hadn't implemented.

clusters.label: test-bug-or-regression
clusters.signature: 3 appointments.router.caller tests throwing 'Appointments must start and end between 07:00 and 19:00'
